name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance at 4042 E 11 Mile Rd ste b, Warren, MI 48091 is Mon-Fri 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM. Call +1 586-327-6517.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical storefront at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd in Detroit, Michigan, with extended hours seven days a week—Monday through Friday 8am to 9pm and weekends 10am to 7pm. The company also maintains a corporate address in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rather than funding loans directly from its own balance sheet, US Cash Advance functions as a loan connection service, matching borrowers with third-party lenders through an online inquiry form. The business targets borrowers who need fast access to small amounts of cash and may have limited options at traditional banks.

The company's primary offerings are payday loans and cash advance loans capped at $1,000, aimed at covering short-term emergency expenses. In addition to these core products, the website advertises bad credit personal loans from $250 to $50,000, same-day loans, loans without credit checks, debt consolidation, and personal loans for bad credit. All products are listed as unsecured—no collateral is required. The application process involves completing an online inquiry form, being matched with a third-party lender, reviewing the loan offer, signing a contract, and receiving funds, which in some cases arrives the same day.

The Detroit location provides in-person service, which customer reviews suggest is a genuine differentiator. Multiple reviewers praised a staff member named Doris specifically for her patience, clear explanations of repayment terms, and low-pressure approach. One reviewer reported completing the entire process in under 45 minutes at the branch. The seven-day-a-week schedule with evening hours on weekdays extends accessibility for borrowers who cannot visit during standard business hours. The company's stated policy of accepting all credit types across every product category positions it as an option for borrowers who have been turned down elsewhere due to poor or limited credit history.

Transparency is a significant limitation. The website does not publish APR ranges, origination fees, or repayment term examples anywhere, making it impossible to evaluate the true cost of borrowing before applying. Because US Cash Advance connects borrowers with unnamed third-party lenders rather than underwriting loans itself, the actual terms—including interest rates and fees—are set by lenders the borrower has no prior relationship with. The contact email on the Detroit branch page uses a staging server domain (kinsta.cloud), an unusual signal for a consumer-facing financial service. Payday-style loans of this type typically carry very high effective annual interest rates, and borrowers should read any loan agreement carefully before signing.
address: 4042 E 11 Mile Rd ste b, Warren, MI 48091

company_info.headquarters: 4042 E 11 Mile Rd ste b, Warren, MI 48091

pros: Open seven days a week with weekday hours until 9pm—broader than most payday lenders
In-person service at Detroit branch with a reported sub-45-minute approval process
Accepts all credit types, explicitly including bad credit and no-credit-check borrowers
No collateral required on any loan product
Same-day funding available for qualifying borrowers
Bad credit personal loans advertised up to $50,000 via third-party lender network
Customer reviews cite transparent, no-pressure staff communication on repayment terms
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment term examples published anywhere on the website
Operates as a loan broker, not a direct lender—actual loan terms set by unnamed third parties
Contact email uses a development/staging server domain (kinsta.cloud), an unusual signal for a consumer finance company
No online pre-approval tool; full inquiry form submission required before seeing any offer
Core payday and cash advance products capped at $1,000—not suitable for larger emergency needs without third-party referral
best_for: Detroit-area residents who prefer in-person service for short-term emergency borrowing
Borrowers with bad credit or no credit history declined by traditional lenders
People needing same-day or next-day cash for amounts under $1,000
Borrowers with non-standard schedules who need evening or weekend access to a physical location
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area borrowers with bad or no credit who need fast access to small amounts of cash and value in-person service with flexible hours. The primary caveat is that the company acts as a lead generator connecting applicants to unnamed third-party lenders, and no cost or rate information is disclosed upfront—borrowers cannot evaluate the true cost of a loan until after submitting a full application.
services: In-person loan processing at Detroit branch
